name: claude-session-sync
description: Sync Claude Code conversation history (and skills/MCP) across machines — via an existing file-sync folder (Syncthing/iCloud/Dropbox/OneDrive/Google Drive) OR self-contained over a git remote (no external sync app needed). Per-project locking prevents simultaneous-access corruption. Auto-titles conversations by content and language. The claude -h browser adds favorites, conversation forking, and start-new-with-context. An interactive 'claude -a' settings menu sets up auto-starting claude at login — multiple conversations, each with its own model and thinking depth — with a multi-instance check, and surfaces sync status, an auto-title toggle, and restore-to-original. Windows/macOS/Linux.
